messages.unknownSubmitError: Cannot save changes due to unknown error.
messages.format: Tag cannot be empty, start or end with "/", or contain "//".
messages.parentTagNotFound: Parent tag not found, please select another tag.

deletion.confirm: Really want to delete tag "{{name}}" and all sub tags?

creator.title: Create new workspace
creator.description: Each workspace is a self-contained space for your notes, tags, and files. Everything stays separate, while still living inside your encrypted vault — ready when you switch.

error.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.

error.title: Workspace "{{name}}" failed to load
error.description: Failed to load this workspace. The data may be corrupted. Switch to another workspace or create a new one to keep working.

editor.placeholder: Capture an idea, task, or thought…

apply.title: Apply version
apply.readonlyTitle: Version cannot be applied for a read-only note

saveVersion.label: Save snapshot
saveVersion.title: Save the current state of this note as a new version in history

deleteAll.label: Delete all
deleteAll.title: Permanently delete all saved versions of this note

versions.dontRecord: Don't record history for this note
versions.empty: This note has no recorded versions

confirmDeleteAll.title: Delete all note versions
confirmDeleteAll.description: This action will permanently delete all note versions.

confirmApply.title: Apply note version
confirmApply.description: You are about to apply note version {{version}}.
confirmApply.warning: This action will replace current note data with text of a selected snapshot. Are you sure?

confirmDelete.title: Delete note version
confirmDelete.description: You are about to delete note version {{version}}.
confirmDelete.warning: This action will delete note version irreversibly. Are you sure?

bin.confirmMoveToBin: Do you want to move this note to the bin?
bin.confirmPermanentDeletion: Do you want to permanently delete this note?

files.confirmLargeUpload: Are you sure you want to upload {{filesCount}} files ({{size}} total)?

notesList.empty: No notes here yet. <create>Create a note</create>

empty.placeholder: Select a note to start reading or editing

header.insertTitle: Click to insert header with level {{level}}. Open context menu to choose another option

editorPanel.codeBlock: Insert or wrap text with code block
editorPanel.quoteBlock: Insert or wrap text with quote block

image.dialogDescription: Image will be inserted at cursor position.

link.dialogDescription: Selected text becomes a link, or link will be added at cursor position if nothing selected.

appUpdate.title: App update
appUpdate.reminderLater: The reminder will be shown week later

newVersion.title: New version is available
newVersion.body: A new version is ready. Update to get the latest improvements and fixes.

sync.title: Click to save changes on disk
